attempts.agent_commands:
}
    if clean_metadata_fields:
        for field in clean_metadata_fields:
            cleaned_meta[field] = \"\"
    doc.set_metadata(cleaned_meta)
    
    # Remove XMP metadata if present
    try:
        doc.del_xml_metadata()
    except Exception:
        pass

    doc.save(output_path, garbage=4, deflate=True)
    doc.close()
    print(f\"  Saved: {output_path}\")


def verify_redaction(output_path, redaction_dict, paper_name):
    \"\"\"Verify that redacted strings are no longer present in the output.\"\"\"
    import subprocess
    result = subprocess.run(
        [\"pdftotext\", output_path, \"-\"],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60
    )
    text = result.stdout.lower()
    
    # Check before references section
    ref_start = text.find(\"references\")
    if ref_start > 0:
        text_before_refs = text[:ref_start]
    else:
        text_before_refs = text
    
    issues = []
    
    # Check authors (only before references)
    for author in redaction_dict.get(\"authors\", []):
        if author.lower() in text_before_refs:
            issues.append(f\"  FOUND author: {author}\")
    
    # Check affiliations (full text)
    for aff in redaction_dict.get(\"affiliations\", []):
        if aff.lower() in text:
            issues.append(f\"  FOUND affiliation: {aff}\")
    
    # Check identifiers (full text)
    for ident in redaction_dict.get(\"identifiers\", []):
        if ident.lower() in text:
            issues.append(f\"  FOUND identifier: {ident}\")
    
    if issues:
        print(f\"  WARNING - {paper_name} still contains:\")
        for issue in issues:
            print(issue)
    else:
        print(f\"  OK - {paper_name} verification passed\")
    
    return issues


# ============================================================================
# Process each paper
# ============================================================================

print(\"=\" * 60)
print(\"Paper 1: VERA (arXiv paper)\")
print(\"=\" * 60)
redact_pdf(
    \"/root/paper1.pdf\",
    os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper1.pdf\"),
    PAPER1_REDACTIONS,
)

print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)
print(\"Paper 2: Singing Voice (Interspeech)\")
print(\"=\" * 60)
redact_pdf(
    \"/root/paper2.pdf\",
    os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper2.pdf\"),
    PAPER2_REDACTIONS,
)

print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)
print(\"Paper 3: SpeechPrune (ICML Workshop)\")
print(\"=\" * 60)
redact_pdf(
    \"/root/paper3.pdf\",
    os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper3.pdf\"),
    PAPER3_REDACTIONS,
)

# ============================================================================
# Verify all papers
# ============================================================================
print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)
print(\"Verification\")
print(\"=\" * 60)

v1 = verify_redaction(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper1.pdf\"), PAPER1_REDACTIONS, \"paper1\")
v2 = verify_redaction(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper2.pdf\"), PAPER2_REDACTIONS, \"paper2\")
v3 = verify_redaction(os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, \"paper3.pdf\"), PAPER3_REDACTIONS, \"paper3\")

if not v1 and not v2 and not v3:
    print(\"\\nAll papers anonymized successfully"'!")
else:
    print("'"\\nSome issues remain - see above.\")
PYEOF
echo \"Script created\""
cd /root && python3 anonymize.py
/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path

OUTPUT_DIR = Path(\"/root/redacted\")

# Exact checks from the verifier
PAPER1_AUTHORS = [\"Yueqian Lin\",\"Zhengmian Hu\",\"Qinsi Wang\",\"Yudong Liu\",\"Hengfan Zhang\",\"Jayakumar Subramanian\",\"Nikos Vlassis\",\"Hai Li\",\"Helen Li\",\"Yiran Chen\"]
PAPER2_AUTHORS = [\"Jiatong Shi\",\"Yueqian Lin\",\"Xinyi Bai\",\"Keyi Zhang\",\"Yuning Wu\",\"Yuxun Tang\",\"Yifeng Yu\",\"Qin Jin\",\"Shinji Watanabe\"]
PAPER3_AUTHORS = [\"Yueqian Lin\",\"Yuzhe Fu\",\"Jingyang Zhang\",\"Yudong Liu\",\"Jianyi Zhang\",\"Jingwei Sun\",\"Hai Li\",\"Yiran Chen\"]

PAPER1_AFFILIATIONS = [\"Duke University\", \"Adobe\"]
PAPER2_AFFILIATIONS = [\"Carnegie Mellon\",\"Duke Kunshan\",\"Cornell\",\"Renmin University\",\"Georgia Tech\"]
PAPER3_AFFILIATIONS = [\"Duke University\"]

PAPER1_IDENTIFIERS = [\"arXiv:2509.26542\"]
PAPER2_IDENTIFIERS = [\"10.21437/Interspeech.2024-33\", \"Shengyuan Xu\", \"Pengcheng Zhu\"]
PAPER3_IDENTIFIERS = [\"Equal contribution\", \"yl768@duke.edu\", \"ICML Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio\"]

PAPER1_TITLE_KEYWORDS = [\"VERA\", \"Voice\", \"Evaluation\", \"Reasoning\"]
PAPER2_TITLE_KEYWORDS = [\"Singing\", \"Voice\", \"Data\", \"Scaling\"]
PAPER3_TITLE_KEYWORDS = [\"SPEECHPRUNE\", \"Context\", \"Pruning\"]

MIN_CONTENT_LENGTHS = {\"paper1.pdf\": 35000, \"paper2.pdf\": 10000, \"paper3.pdf\": 12000}

def extract_text(pdf_path):
    result = subprocess.run([\"pdftotext\", str(pdf_path), \"-\"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
    return result.stdout

def get_pages(pdf_path):
    result = subprocess.run([\"pdfinfo\", str(pdf_path)], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
    for line in result.stdout.split(\"\\n\"):
        if line.startswith(\"Pages:\"):
            return int(line.split(\":\")[1].strip())
    return 0

papers = [
    (\"paper1.pdf\", PAPER1_AUTHORS, PAPER1_AFFILIATIONS, PAPER1_IDENTIFIERS, PAPER1_TITLE_KEYWORDS),
    (\"paper2.pdf\", PAPER2_AUTHORS, PAPER2_AFFILIATIONS, PAPER2_IDENTIFIERS, PAPER2_TITLE_KEYWORDS),
    (\"paper3.pdf\", PAPER3_AUTHORS, PAPER3_AFFILIATIONS, PAPER3_IDENTIFIERS, PAPER3_TITLE_KEYWORDS),
]

all_ok = True
for fname, authors, affiliations, identifiers, title_kw in papers:
    pdf_path = OUTPUT_DIR / fname
    text = extract_text(pdf_path)
    text_lower = text.lower()
    pages = get_pages(pdf_path)
    
    print(f\"\\n{'='*50}\")
    print(f\"{fname}: {pages} pages, {len(text)} chars\")
    
    # Content length check
    min_len = MIN_CONTENT_LENGTHS[fname]
    if len(text) < min_len:
        print(f\"  FAIL: content too short ({len(text)} < {min_len})\")
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print(f\"  OK: content length {len(text)} >= {min_len}\")
    
    # Author check (before references)
    ref_start = text_lower.find(\"references\")
    check_text = text_lower[:ref_start] if ref_start > 0 else text_lower
    found_authors = [a for a in authors if a.lower() in check_text]
    if found_authors:
        print(f\"  FAIL: authors found: {found_authors}\")
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print(f\"  OK: all {len(authors)} authors redacted\")
    
    # Affiliation check (full text)
    found_aff = [a for a in affiliations if a.lower() in text_lower]
    if found_aff:
        print(f\"  FAIL: affiliations found: {found_aff}\")
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print(f\"  OK: all {len(affiliations)} affiliations redacted\")
    
    # Identifier check (full text)
    found_id = [i for i in identifiers if i.lower() in text_lower]
    if found_id:
        print(f\"  FAIL: identifiers found: {found_id}\")
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print(f\"  OK: all {len(identifiers)} identifiers redacted\")
    
    # Title keywords preserved
    missing_kw = [k for k in title_kw if k.lower() not in text_lower]
    if missing_kw:
        print(f\"  FAIL: title keywords missing: {missing_kw}\")
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print(f\"  OK: all title keywords preserved\")

print(f\"\\n{'='*50}\")
print(f\"OVERALL: {'ALL PASSED' if all_ok else 'SOME FAILURES'}\")
PYEOF"
/bin/bash -lc '# Check metadata is clean and self-citations preserved
echo "=== Metadata check ==="
for f in /root/redacted/paper{1,2,3}.pdf; do
    echo "--- $(basename $f) ---"
    pdfinfo "$f" | grep -iE "author|subject|keyword"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Self-citation preservation ==="
# Paper1: "Lin et al., 2025c" should be in references
pdftotext /root/redacted/paper1.pdf - | grep -i "Lin et al., 2025c" | head -3
echo "paper1 self-cite check done"

# Paper2: "Muskits" should be preserved
pdftotext /root/redacted/paper2.pdf - | grep -i "Muskits" | head -3
echo "paper2 self-cite check done"'
